title: 人机交互，机器人技术论文速递--(2026-03-25)
author: tianhe
digest: 今日最新 Arxiv 论文摘要汇总 (2026-03-25)
content:
璇玑枢，助力学术成长，点亮科研之路

 

今日论文合集：cs.HC人机交互46篇，cs.RO机器人技术65篇，q-bio.NC神经元和认知2篇

本文只展示部分论文，全部详情，AI总结请访问，或点击阅读原文
https://scouthe.github.io/arxiv_crawler_ai_enhanced/

 

 

人机交互(cs.HC:Human-Computer Interaction)

【1】MRATTS: An MR-Based Acupoint Therapy Training System with Real-Time Acupoint Detection and Evaluation Standards

标题 : MRATTS：基于MR的穴位治疗训练系统，具有实时穴位检测和评估标准
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23445
作者：Jiacheng Liu,Bohan Chen,Qian Wang,Weichao Song,Fangfei Ye,Liang Zhou,Haibin Ling,Bingyao Huang
摘要：穴位疗法是中医的核心治疗方法，探穴、针灸的专业知识和技能要求很高。现有的基于混合现实（MR）的训练方法通常无法准确实时检测和可视化真人的手部、肢体或躯干上的穴位，并且不支持各种针灸技术。此外，基于 MR 的训练期间通常缺少评估标准和包含每个步骤详细信息的视觉指导。为此，我们提出基于MR的中医穴位治疗教学系统（MRATTS）——基于MR的穴位治疗教学和培训框架。 MRATTS基于实时手部、肢体和躯干穴位检测方法，通过MR准确跟踪和可视化真实患者的穴位。除此之外，我们与经验丰富的穴位治疗师合作，针对各种穴位治疗技术设计了一种交互式视觉引导的练习方法，模拟穴位按摩、针灸（插针、提插、捻转）和艾灸（轻灸、雀啄、旋转）。 MRATTS制定了一套基于中医理论的评估标准，以实现对穴位治疗的准确性和熟练程度进行评分和可视化。 MRATTS 的有效性和实用性通过受控用户研究和专家反馈进行评估。研究结果表明，与对照组相比，MRATTS 组在理解穴位 3D 位置和穴位治疗熟练程度方面表现出明显改善。
Abstract：Acupoint therapy is a core therapeutic method of Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM), and it requires a high level of expertise and skills to detect acupoints and perform acupuncture and moxibustion. Existing mixed reality (MR)-based training methods often fall short in accurate real-time detection and visualization of acupoints on the hand, limb, or torso of a real person and do not support various techniques of acupuncture and moxibustion. Moreover, evaluation standards and visual guidance with fine details for each step during MR-based training are typically missing. To this end, we propose the MR-based TCM Acupoint Therapy Teaching System (MRATTS)--an MR-based acupoint therapy teaching and training framework. MRATTS is based on a real-time hand, limb, and torso acupoint detection method to accurately track and visualize acupoints on real patients through MR. On top of that, in collaboration with an experienced acupoint therapist, we design a practice method with interactive visual guidance for various acupoint therapy techniques that simulate acupressure, acupuncture (insertion, lifting-thrusting, and twisting), and moxibustion (mild, sparrow-pecking, and whirling). A set of TCM theory-based evaluation standards is formulated within MRATTS to enable the scoring and visualization of the accuracy and proficiency of acupoint therapy. The effectiveness and usefulness of MRATTS are evaluated through a controlled user study and expert feedback. Results of the study indicate that the MRATTS group shows clear improvements in understanding 3D locations of acupoints and proficiency in acupoint therapy compared to control groups.

 


【2】Biased Error Attribution in Multi-Agent Human-AI Systems Under Delayed Feedback

标题 : 延迟反馈下多智能体人类人工智能系统中的偏差错误归因
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23419
作者：Teerthaa Parakh,Karen M. Feigh
摘要：人类决策受到认知偏差的强烈影响，特别是在不确定性和风险的条件下。虽然之前的工作已经研究了具有即时结果的单步决策以及人类与单个自主代理的交互中的偏差，但相对较少关注涉及多个人工智能代理的延迟结果下的决策，其中每一步的决策都会影响后续状态。在这项工作中，我们研究了延迟结果如何影响多智能体人类人工智能任务中的决策和责任归属。使用基于游戏的受控实验，我们分析参与者如何根据积极和消极的结果调整自己的行为。我们观察到对收益和损失的不对称反应，在出现负面结果后会进行更强有力的纠正调整。重要的是，参与者常常无法正确识别导致失败的行为，并错误地分配人工智能代理的责任，从而导致对与绩效不佳的根本原因微弱相关的决策进行系统性修改。我们将这种现象称为归因偏差的一种形式，表现为延迟反馈下的偏差错误归因。我们的研究结果强调了认知偏差如何在具有延迟结果和多个自主代理的人类人工智能系统中放大，强调了决策支持系统需要随着时间的推移更好地支持因果理解和学习。
Abstract：Human decision-making is strongly influenced by cognitive biases, particularly under conditions of uncertainty and risk. While prior work has examined bias in single-step decisions with immediate outcomes and in human interaction with a single autonomous agent, comparatively little attention has been paid to decision-making under delayed outcomes involving multiple AI agents, where decisions at each step affect subsequent states. In this work, we study how delayed outcomes shape decision-making and responsibility attribution in a multi-agent human-AI task. Using a controlled game-based experiment, we analyze how participants adjust their behavior following positive and negative outcomes. We observe asymmetric responses to gains and losses, with stronger corrective adjustments after negative outcomes. Importantly, participants often fail to correctly identify the actions that caused failure and misattribute responsibility across AI agents, leading to systematic revisions of decisions that are weakly related to the underlying causes of poor performance. We refer to this phenomenon as a form of attribution bias, manifested as biased error attribution under delayed feedback. Our findings highlight how cognitive biases can be amplified in human-AI systems with delayed outcomes and multiple autonomous agents, underscoring the need for decision-support systems that better support causal understanding and learning over time.

 


【3】"I Might be Using His... But It is Also Mine!": Ownership and Control in Accounts Designed for Sharing

标题 : “我可能会使用他的......但它也是我的！”：专为共享而设计的帐户的所有权和控制权
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23391
作者：Ji Eun Song,Jaeyoun You,Joongseek Lee
摘要：用户对虚拟对象（例如云文件）的所有权感知通常是不确定的。这对于具有共享帐户 (DS) 的流媒体平台是否有效？我们观察流媒体平台 DS 帐户内的共享实践，并通过两项混合方法研究确定其所有权特征和意外的复杂性。临时和成本分摊是确定的两种分摊做法。在前者中，所有者是帐户的唯一付款人，而在后者中，个人资料持有者则分担费用。我们在每个实践中区分两种所有权类型——主要所有权和双重所有权。在主要所有权中，帐户所有者有权允许其他人使用该帐户；在双重所有权中，主要所有权与共同所有权一起出现，尤其表现出用户之间所有权观念的不对称。当共享协议破裂时就会出现冲突。因此，我们提出了基于 DS 帐户共享实践来弥合所有权差异的设计建议。
Abstract：A user's ownership perception of virtual objects, such as cloud files, is generally uncertain. Is this valid for streaming platforms featuring accounts designed for sharing (DS)? We observe sharing practices within DS accounts of streaming platforms and identify their ownership characteristics and unexpected complications through two mixed-method studies. Casual and Cost-splitting are the two sharing practices identified. The owner is the sole payer for the account in the former, whereas profile holders split the cost in the latter. We distinguish two types of ownership in each practice -- Primary and Dual. In Primary ownership, the account owner has the power to allow others to use the account; in Dual ownership, Primary ownership appears in conjunction with joint ownership, notably displaying asymmetric ownership perceptions among users. Conflicts arise when the sharing agreements collapse. Therefore, we propose design recommendations that bridge ownership differences based on sharing practices of DS accounts.

 


【4】Design Space and Implementation of RAG-Based Avatars for Virtual Archaeology

标题 : 基于 RAG 的虚拟考古虚拟形象的设计空间和实现
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23353
作者：Wilhelm Kerle-Malcharek,Giulio Biondi,Karsten Klein,Ulf Hailer,Steffen Diefenbach,Fabrizio Grosso,Marco Legittimo,Paola Venuti,Carla Binucci,Giuseppe Liotta,Falk Schreiber
摘要：虚拟现实和增强现实等沉浸式技术使用户能够探索具有重要文化意义的遗址并与之互动，从而改变数字遗产。现在可以查看和增强数字孪生或其数字重建版本，并允许更广泛的受众访问以前无法到达的位置。在这里，我们研究基于检索增强生成（RAG）的化身作为一个界面，用于在沉浸在专用虚拟环境中时访问有关数字文化遗产对象的更多信息。我们提出了一个涵盖应用领域、化身个性和 I/O 模式的需求设计空间。我们在虚拟现实 (VR) 环境中使用与对话化身耦合的 RAG 系统对其进行实例化，并使用公元 4 世纪的马克森提乌斯陵墓作为案例研究，通过该系统，用户可以访问数字化遗产对象的精选点播信息。我们的工作流程利用学术文本并通过元数据丰富它们。我们根据专家制作的小型问答集的答案质量以及使用此类 RAG 化身的 VR 设置的用户感知的工作负载来评估各种 RAG 配置。我们证明，有证据表明，用户认为与此类化身交互的总体工作量低于平均水平，并且此类化身有助于获得话题参与度。总的来说，我们的工作展示了如何利用 RAG 驱动的 VR 化身进行考古目的，并提供证据表明它们可以为沉浸式、人工智能增强的数字遗产应用提供一条途径。
Abstract：Immersive technologies, such as virtual and augmented reality, are transforming digital heritage by enabling users to explore and interact with culturally significant sites. It is now possible to view and augment digital twins, or digitally reconstructed versions of them, and to enable access to previously unreachable locations for a broader audience. Here, we investigate retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)-based avatars as an interface for accessing further information about digital cultural heritage objects while immersed in dedicated virtual environments. We present a requirement design space that spans the application realm, avatar personality, and I/O modalities. We instantiate it with a RAG system coupled to a conversational avatar in a virtual reality (VR) environment, using the Maxentius mausoleum from the 4th century AD as a case study, through which users gain access to curated on-demand information of the digitised heritage object. Our workflow utilises scholarly texts and enriches them with metadata. We evaluate various RAG configurations in terms of answer quality on a small expert-crafted question-answer set, as well as the perceived workload of users of a VR setup using such a RAG avatar. We demonstrate evidence that users perceive the overall workload for interacting with such an avatar as below average and that such avatars help to gain topical engagement. Overall, our work demonstrates how to utilise RAG-driven VR avatars for archaeological purposes and provides evidence that they can offer a pathway for immersive, AI-enhanced digital heritage applications.

 


【5】Who Is in the Room? Stakeholder Perspectives on AI Recording in Pediatric Emergency Care

标题 : 房间里有谁？利益相关者对儿科急诊护理中人工智能记录的看法
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23187
作者：Alexandre De Masi,Sergio Manzano,Johan N. Siebert,Frederic Ehrler
摘要：在儿科紧急情况下记录语音和视频的人工智能系统正在成为人机交互 (HCI) 技术，对临床工作产生直接影响，有望改善文档记录、团队绩效和事后汇报。然而，这些技术的设计和治理基本上没有考虑受影响最严重的人，包括临床医生、家长和儿童患者的观点。本立场文件认为，这对这些系统的合法性和有效性有直接影响。我们研究了这些缺失的观点被证明是重要的四个领域（同意、情感影响、监视动态和参与式治理），并提出了四个立场，将儿科急诊护理中的人工智能记录重新定位为以利益相关者为中心的人机交互查询。
Abstract：Artificial intelligence systems that record voice and video during pediatric emergencies are emerging as human-computer interaction (HCI) technologies with direct implications for clinical work, promising improvements in documentation, team performance, and post-event debriefing. Yet the perspectives of those most affected, including clinicians, parents, and child patients, remain largely absent from the design and governance of these technologies. This position paper argues that this has direct consequences for the legitimacy and effectiveness of these systems. We examine four areas where these missing perspectives prove consequential (consent, emotional impact, surveillance dynamics, and participatory governance) and propose four positions for reorienting AI recording in pediatric emergency care toward stakeholder-centered HCI inquiry.

 


【6】Good for the Planet, Bad for Me? Intended and Unintended Consequences of AI Energy Consumption Disclosure

标题 : 对地球有利，对我不利？人工智能能源消耗披露的有意和无意的后果
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23075
作者：Michael Klesel,Uwe Messer
摘要：为了解决人工智能的高能耗问题，能源消耗披露（ECD）被提出来引导用户采取更可持续的实践，例如选择高效的小语言模型（SLM）而不是大语言模型（LLM）。这为用户提供了性能与可持续性的权衡。在一项涉及 365 名参与者的实验中，我们探讨了 ECD 的影响以及选择 SLM 而不是 LLM 的感知和行为后果。我们的研究结果表明，ECD 是一种非常有效的措施，可以促使个人做出有利于环境的选择，使选择节能 SLM 的几率比选择 LLM 的几率高出 12 倍以上。有趣的是，这种选择并没有显着影响后续行为，因为选择 SLM 的个人和选择 LLM 的个人表现出类似的即时行为。然而，这种选择造成了感知偏差。安慰剂效应出现了，选择“环保”SLM 的个人报告满意度和感知质量显着降低。这些结果凸显了 ECD 的双刃性质，它对可持续人机交互的设计具有重要意义。
Abstract：To address the high energy consumption of artificial intelligence, energy consumption disclosure (ECD) has been proposed to steer users toward more sustainable practices, such as choosing efficient small language models (SLMs) over large language models (LLMs). This presents a performance-sustainability trade-off for users. In an experiment with 365 participants, we explore the impact of ECD and the perceptual and behavioral consequences of choosing an SLM over an LLM. Our findings reveal that ECD is a highly effective measure to nudge individuals toward a pro-environmental choice, increasing the odds of choosing an energy efficient SLM over an LLM by more than 12. Interestingly, this choice did not significantly impact subsequent behavior, as individuals who selected an SLM and those who selected an LLM demonstrated similar prompt behavior. Nevertheless, the choice created a perceptual bias. A placebo effect emerged, with individuals who selected the "eco-friendly" SLM reporting significantly lower satisfaction and perceived quality. These results highlight the double-edged nature of ECD, which holds critical implications for the design of sustainable human-computer interactions.

 


【7】From Morality Installation in LLMs to LLMs in Morality-as-a-System

标题 : 从法学硕士的道德安装到法学硕士的道德体系
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22944
作者：Gunter Bombaerts
摘要：大语言模型 (LLM) 中的道德工作通过宪法人工智能、人类反馈强化学习 (RLHF) 和系统基准测试取得了进展，但仍然缺乏将内部道德表征与监管义务联系起来、在整个开发堆栈中设计文化多元性以及监控道德属性在已部署系统的生命周期中如何变化的工具。这些困难反映了共同的根源。道德是在训练时植入模型中的。相反，我提出了一个以尼克拉斯·卢曼（Niklas Luhmann）的社会系统理论为基础的道德作为系统的框架，该框架将法学硕士道德视为社会技术系统的动态的、新兴的属性。已部署的法学硕士的道德行为在培训时并不固定。它通过跨越神经基质、训练数据、对齐程序、系统提示、调节、运行时动态和用户界面的七个结构耦合组件之间的交互来不断复制。这是一篇概念框架论文，而不是实证研究。它从哲学上重新定义了三个已知的挑战，即可解释性与治理之间的差距、跨组件的多元化问题以及生命周期监控的缺乏，作为安装范例无法诊断的结构耦合故障。对于技术研究人员来说，它探讨了关于跨组件表示不一致、作为早期安全信号的表示级别漂移以及生命周期监控的治理优势的三个说明性假设。对于哲学家和治理专家来说，它提供了一个词汇表，用于在现有治理框架内指定底层监控义务。道德作为一个系统框架不会取代宪法人工智能或 RLHF 等元素，而是将它们嵌入到更大的时间和结构账户中，并指定这些方法所需的额外基础设施。
Abstract：Work on morality in large language models (LLMs) has progressed via constitutional AI, reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and systematic benchmarking, yet it still lacks tools to connect internal moral representations to regulatory obligations, to design cultural plurality across the full development stack, and to monitor how moral properties drift over the lifecycle of a deployed system. These difficulties reflect a shared root. Morality is installed in a model at training time. I propose instead a morality-as-a-system framework, grounded in Niklas Luhmann's social systems theory, that treats LLM morality as a dynamic, emergent property of a sociotechnical system. Moral behaviour in a deployed LLM is not fixed at training. It is continuously reproduced through interactions among seven structurally coupled components spanning the neural substrate, training data, alignment procedures, system prompts, moderation, runtime dynamics, and user interface. This is a conceptual framework paper, not an empirical study. It philosophically reframes three known challenges, the interpretability-governance gap, the cross-component plurality problem, and the absence of lifecycle monitoring, as structural coupling failures that the installation paradigm cannot diagnose. For technical researchers, it explores three illustrative hypotheses about cross-component representational inconsistency, representation-level drift as an early safety signal, and the governance advantage of lifecycle monitoring. For philosophers and governance specialists, it offers a vocabulary for specifying substrate-level monitoring obligations within existing governance frameworks. The morality-as-a-system framework does not displace elements such as constitutional AI or RLHF it embeds them within a larger temporal and structural account and specifies the additional infrastructure those methods require.

 


【8】IntentWeave: A Progressive Entry Ladder for Multi-Surface Browser Agents in Cloud Portals

标题 : IntentWeave：云门户中多界面浏览器代理的渐进式入口阶梯
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22917
作者：Wanying Mo,Jijia Lai,Xiaoming Wang
摘要：基于 LLM 构建的浏览器代理可以在 Web 界面中运行，但大多数仍然局限于单个聊天界面（例如侧边栏）。这种与真实浏览的不匹配会增加上下文切换并减少用户控制。我们引入了 \textbf{IntentWeave}，这是一个包含十个空间范式的设计空间，用于在浏览器中嵌入代理辅助，组织为从微干预到专用工作空间的渐进式入口阶梯。我们在阿里云网站上将 IntentWeave 作为浏览器扩展原型实现，并在受试者内研究 (N=16) 中比较了三种进入策略。工作空间密集的策略减少了完成时间，但降低了感知控制；仅微观策略保留了控制权，但往往不够；混合边车方法获得了最高的满意度。最后，我们提供了在不中断用户代理的情况下升级和撤回代理界面的指南。
Abstract：Browser agents built on LLMs can act in web interfaces, yet most remain confined to a single chat surface (e.g., a sidebar). This mismatch with real browsing can increase context-switching and reduce user control. We introduce \textbf{IntentWeave}, a design space of ten spatial paradigms for embedding agentic assistance across a browser, organized as a progressive entry ladder from micro-interventions to dedicated workspaces. We implement IntentWeave as a browser-extension prototype on the Alibaba Cloud website and compare three entry strategies in a within-subjects study (N=16). Workspace-heavy strategies reduced completion time but lowered perceived control; micro-only strategies preserved control but were often insufficient; a mixed sidecar approach achieved the highest satisfaction. We conclude with guidance for escalating and retreating agent surfaces without disrupting user agency.

 


【9】TastePrint: A 3D Food Printing System for Layer-wise Taste Distribution via Airbrushed Liquid Seasoning

标题 : TastePrint：一种 3D 食品打印系统，通过喷枪液体调味料实现分层味道分布
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22887
作者：Yamato Miyatake,Parinya Punpongsanon
摘要：3D 食品打印可以定制食品形状和质地，但由于可打印材料的多样性有限，通常会产生统一的口味特征。我们推出了 TastePrint，这是一种 3D 食品打印系统，该系统通过在制造过程中使用可编程喷枪动态应用液体调味料来实现分层空间味道分布。该系统集成了 (1) 图形用户界面 (GUI)，允许用户导入 3D 模型、将其切片并指定每层的喷涂位置和强度，以及 (2) 配备多喷嘴喷涂机构的定制 3D 食品打印机。我们通过量化喷雾分辨率和沉积精度的技术实验以及涉及三位家庭厨师设计个性化口味模式的探索性可用性研究来评估该系统。喷雾分辨率模型达到R2 = 0.86，喷雾量模型达到R2 = 0.99，参与者平均在大约15分钟内完成设计任务。这些结果表明，TastePrint 可以以良好的可重复性控制调味料的放置和数量，同时支持探索性的口味设计工作流程。这项工作为将食品几何形状与口味设计脱钩奠定了技术基础，并激发了未来对个性化、多感官食品制造的感官研究。
Abstract：3D food printing enables the customization of food shapes and textures, but typically produces uniform taste profiles due to the limited diversity of printable materials. We present TastePrint, a 3D food printing system that achieves layer-wise spatial taste distribution by dynamically applying liquid seasonings with a programmable airbrush during fabrication. The system integrates (1) a graphical user interface (GUI) that allows users to import 3D models, slice them into layers, and specify spray positions and intensities for each layer, and (2) a customized 3D food printer equipped with a multi-nozzle spray mechanism. We evaluated the system through technical experiments quantifying spray resolution and deposition accuracy, together with an exploratory usability study involving three home cooks designing personalized taste patterns. The spray-resolution model achieved R2 = 0.86, the spray-amount model achieved R2 = 0.99, and participants completed the design task in approximately 15 min on average. These results indicate that TastePrint can control seasoning placement and quantity with good repeatability while supporting exploratory taste-design workflows. This work establishes a technical foundation for decoupling food geometry from taste design and motivates future sensory studies on personalized, multisensory food fabrication.

 


【10】"Don't Look, But I Know You Do": Norms and Observer Effects in Shared LLM Accounts

标题 : “别看，但我知道你在看”：共享法学硕士账户中的规范和观察者效应
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22822
作者：Ji Eun Song,Eunchae Lee,Juhee Im,Hyunsoo Jang,Eunji Kim,Joongseek Lee
摘要：帐户共享在订阅服务中很常见，现在已扩展到生成式人工智能平台，这些平台仍然主要为个人使用而设计。共享往往需要变通办法，从而造成新的紧张局势。本研究探讨了法学硕士订阅的共享方式以及制定的规范。我们将对 245 名用户进行的调查与对 36 名参与者的采访相结合，以了解模式和生活经历。我们的分析确定了四种类型的帐户共享，按照两个维度进行组织：所有者是否使用帐户以及订阅费用是否共享。在这些类型中，我们研究了规范是如何形成的，以及它们的脆弱性（尤其是隐私）如何在实践中变得明显。用户充分意识到这一点，巧妙地调整了他们的行为，我们通过观察者效应的镜头来解释这一点。我们将法学硕士帐户共享视为一种挪用的社会实践，并概述了使单用户平台适应多用户现实的设计含义。
Abstract：Account sharing is common in subscription services and is now extending to generative AI platforms, which are still primarily designed for individual use. Sharing often requires workarounds that create new tensions. This study examines how LLM subscriptions are shared and the norms that develop. We combined a survey of 245 users with interviews of 36 participants to understand both patterns and lived experiences. Our analysis identified four types of account sharing, organized along two dimensions: whether the owner uses the account and whether subscription costs are shared. Within these types, we examined how norms were formed and how their fragility, especially privacy, became evident in practice. Users, fully aware of this, subtly adjusted their behavior, which we interpret through the lens of the observer effect. We frame LLM account sharing as a social practice of appropriation and outline design implications to adapt single-user platforms to multi-user realities.

 


 

机器人技术(cs.RO:Robotics)

【1】VTAM: Video-Tactile-Action Models for Complex Physical Interaction Beyond VLAs

标题 : VTAM：超越 VLA 的复杂物理交互的视频触觉动作模型
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23481
作者：Haoran Yuan,Weigang Yi,Zhenyu Zhang,Wendi Chen,Yuchen Mo,Jiashi Yin,Xinzhuo Li,Xiangyu Zeng,Chuan Wen,Cewu Lu,Katherine Driggs-Campbell,Ismini Lourentzou
摘要：视频动作模型（VAM）已成为一种有前途的体现智能框架，它可以从原始视频流中学习隐式世界动态，以产生时间一致的动作预测。尽管此类模型通过视觉推理在长视野任务中表现出强大的性能，但它们在接触丰富的场景中仍然受到限制，在这种场景中，仅通过视觉只能部分观察到关键的交互状态。特别是，细粒度的力调制和接触转换没有可靠地编码在视觉标记中，导致不稳定或不精确的行为。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了视频触觉动作模型（VTAM），这是一种多模式世界建模框架，将触觉感知作为补充接地信号。 VTAM 通过轻量级模态传输微调，用触觉流增强了预训练视频转换器，从而无需触觉语言配对数据或独立触觉预训练即可实现高效的跨模态表示学习。为了稳定多模态融合，我们引入了触觉正则化损失，以强制平衡的跨模态注意力，防止动作模型中的视觉潜在优势。 VTAM 在接触丰富的操作中表现出卓越的性能，平均保持 90% 的稳健成功率。在需要高保真力感知的薯片拾放等具有挑战性的场景中，VTAM 的性能比 pi 0.5 基线高出 80%。我们的研究结果表明，整合触觉反馈对于纠正世界动作模型中的视觉估计错误至关重要，为物理接地的具体基础模型提供了一种可扩展的方法。
Abstract：Video-Action Models (VAMs) have emerged as a promising framework for embodied intelligence, learning implicit world dynamics from raw video streams to produce temporally consistent action predictions. Although such models demonstrate strong performance on long-horizon tasks through visual reasoning, they remain limited in contact-rich scenarios where critical interaction states are only partially observable from vision alone. In particular, fine-grained force modulation and contact transitions are not reliably encoded in visual tokens, leading to unstable or imprecise behaviors. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Video-Tactile Action Model (VTAM), a multimodal world modeling framework that incorporates tactile perception as a complementary grounding signal. VTAM augments a pretrained video transformer with tactile streams via a lightweight modality transfer finetuning, enabling efficient cross-modal representation learning without tactile-language paired data or independent tactile pretraining. To stabilize multimodal fusion, we introduce a tactile regularization loss that enforces balanced cross-modal attention, preventing visual latent dominance in the action model. VTAM demonstrates superior performance in contact-rich manipulation, maintaining a robust success rate of 90 percent on average. In challenging scenarios such as potato chip pick-and-place requiring high-fidelity force awareness, VTAM outperforms the pi 0.5 baseline by 80 percent. Our findings demonstrate that integrating tactile feedback is essential for correcting visual estimation errors in world action models, providing a scalable approach to physically grounded embodied foundation models.

 


【2】Rectify, Don't Regret: Avoiding Pitfalls of Differentiable Simulation in Trajectory Prediction

标题 : 纠正，不要后悔：避免轨迹预测中可微分模拟的陷阱
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23393
作者：Harsh Yadav,Christian Bohn,Tobias Meisen
摘要：当前的开环轨迹模型在现实世界的自动驾驶中举步维艰，因为微小的初始偏差常常会引发复合错误，将智能体推入分布外状态。虽然完全可微的闭环模拟器试图解决这个问题，但它们受到捷径学习的困扰：损失梯度通过诱导状态输入向后流动，无意中将未来的地面真实信息直接泄漏到模型自己之前的预测中。该模型利用这些信号人为地避免漂移，非因果地“后悔”过去的错误，而不是学习真正的反应性恢复。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了分离式后退地平线部署。通过显式地分割模拟步骤之间的计算图，该模型从漂移状态中学习真正的恢复行为，迫使其“纠正”错误，而不是非因果地优化过去的预测。对 nuScenes 和 DeepScenario 数据集的广泛评估表明，我们的方法产生了更稳健的恢复策略，与高重新规划频率下的完全可微闭环训练相比，目标碰撞减少了高达 33.24%。此外，与标准开环基线相比，我们的不可微分框架在密集环境中将碰撞减少了高达 27.74%，同时提高了多模态预测多样性和车道对齐。
Abstract：Current open-loop trajectory models struggle in real-world autonomous driving because minor initial deviations often cascade into compounding errors, pushing the agent into out-of-distribution states. While fully differentiable closed-loop simulators attempt to address this, they suffer from shortcut learning: the loss gradients flow backward through induced state inputs, inadvertently leaking future ground truth information directly into the model's own previous predictions. The model exploits these signals to artificially avoid drift, non-causally "regretting" past mistakes rather than learning genuinely reactive recovery. To address this, we introduce a detached receding horizon rollout. By explicitly severing the computation graph between simulation steps, the model learns genuine recovery behaviors from drifted states, forcing it to "rectify" mistakes rather than non-causally optimizing past predictions. Extensive evaluations on the nuScenes and DeepScenario datasets show our approach yields more robust recovery strategies, reducing target collisions by up to 33.24% compared to fully differentiable closed-loop training at high replanning frequencies. Furthermore, compared to standard open-loop baselines, our non-differentiable framework decreases collisions by up to 27.74% in dense environments while simultaneously improving multi-modal prediction diversity and lane alignment.

 


【3】PinPoint: Monocular Needle Pose Estimation for Robotic Suturing via Stein Variational Newton and Geometric Residuals

标题 : PinPoint：通过 Stein 变分牛顿和几何残差进行机器人缝合的单目针位姿估计
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23365
作者：Jesse F. d'Almeida,Tanner Watts,Susheela Sharma Stern,James Ferguson,Alan Kuntz,Robert J. Webster III
摘要：可靠估计手术针 3D 位置和方向对于自主机器人缝合至关重要，但现有方法几乎完全在立体视觉下运行。在经内窥镜和腔内手术中常见的单眼内窥镜设置中，深度模糊性和旋转对称性使得针姿势估计本质上不合适，在可行的配置上产生多模态分布，而不是单一的、有根据的估计。我们提出了 PinPoint，一种概率变分推理框架，可以直接处理这种歧义，维持姿势假设的分布而不是抑制它。 PinPoint 通过使用封闭式雅可比行列式分析几何似然，将单目图像观察与机器人抓取约束结合起来。该框架能够在斯坦因变分牛顿推理中实现高效的高斯-牛顿预处理，其中二阶粒子输运确定性地将粒子移向高概率区域，而基于核的排斥则保留了多模态结构的多样性。在真实的针跟踪序列中，相对于粒子滤波器基线，PinPoint 将平均平移误差降低了 80%（低至 1.00 毫米），旋转误差降低了 78%（低至 13.80°），并且具有更好的校准不确定性。在诱导旋转序列上，单目模糊性最严重，PinPoint 在 84% 的时间内保持双峰后验，几乎是粒子滤波器基线速率的三倍，正确地保留了备择假设，而不是过早地采用一种模式。离体组织的缝合实验表明，即使针完全嵌入，通过间歇性闭塞也能实现稳定的跟踪，闭塞期间平移的平均误差为 1.34 毫米，旋转的平均误差为 19.18°。
Abstract：Reliable estimation of surgical needle 3D position and orientation is essential for autonomous robotic suturing, yet existing methods operate almost exclusively under stereoscopic vision. In monocular endoscopic settings, common in transendoscopic and intraluminal procedures, depth ambiguity and rotational symmetry render needle pose estimation inherently ill-posed, producing a multimodal distribution over feasible configurations, rather than a single, well-grounded estimate. We present PinPoint, a probabilistic variational inference framework that treats this ambiguity directly, maintaining a distribution of pose hypotheses rather than suppressing it. PinPoint combines monocular image observations with robot-grasp constraints through analytical geometric likelihoods with closed-form Jacobians. This framework enables efficient Gauss-Newton preconditioning in a Stein Variational Newton inference, where second-order particle transport deterministically moves particles toward high-probability regions while kernel-based repulsion preserves diversity in the multimodal structure. On real needle-tracking sequences, PinPoint reduces mean translational error by 80% (down to 1.00 mm) and rotational error by 78% (down to 13.80°) relative to a particle-filter baseline, with substantially better-calibrated uncertainty. On induced-rotation sequences, where monocular ambiguity is most severe, PinPoint maintains a bimodal posterior 84% of the time, almost three times the rate of the particle filter baseline, correctly preserving the alternative hypothesis rather than committing prematurely to one mode. Suturing experiments in ex vivo tissue demonstrate stable tracking through intermittent occlusion, with average errors during occlusion of 1.34 mm in translation and 19.18° in rotation, even when the needle is fully embedded.

 


【4】Edge Radar Material Classification Under Geometry Shifts

标题 : 几何变化下的边缘雷达材料分类
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23342
作者：Jannik Hohmann,Dong Wang,Andreas Nüchter
摘要：材料感知可以改善机器人导航和交互，特别是在相机和激光雷达性能下降的情况下。我们提出了一种专为超低功耗边缘设备 (TI IWRL6432) 设计的轻量级毫米波雷达材料分类管道，使用紧凑的距离仓强度描述符和多层感知器 (MLP) 进行实时推理。虽然分类器在标称训练几何结构下达到 94.2% 的宏观 F1，但我们观察到在实际几何结构变化（包括传感器高度变化和小倾斜角度）下性能明显下降。这些扰动会引起系统强度缩放和角度相关的雷达截面 (RCS) 效应，从而使特征脱离分布并将宏 F1 降低至 68.5% 左右。我们分析这些故障模式，并概述通过归一化、几何增强和运动感知功能提高鲁棒性的实用方向。
Abstract：Material awareness can improve robotic navigation and interaction, particularly in conditions where cameras and LiDAR degrade. We present a lightweight mmWave radar material classification pipeline designed for ultra-low-power edge devices (TI IWRL6432), using compact range-bin intensity descriptors and a Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) for real-time inference. While the classifier reaches a macro-F1 of 94.2\% under the nominal training geometry, we observe a pronounced performance drop under realistic geometry shifts, including sensor height changes and small tilt angles. These perturbations induce systematic intensity scaling and angle-dependent radar cross section (RCS) effects, pushing features out of distribution and reducing macro-F1 to around 68.5\%. We analyze these failure modes and outline practical directions for improving robustness with normalization, geometry augmentation, and motion-aware features.

 


【5】Strain-Parameterized Coupled Dynamics and Dual-Camera Visual Servoing for Aerial Continuum Manipulators

标题 : 空中连续体机械手的应变参数化耦合动力学和双摄像头视觉伺服
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23333
作者：Niloufar Amiri,Farrokh Janabi-Sharifi
摘要：腱驱动空中连续体机械手 (TD-ACM) 结合了无人驾驶飞行器 (UAV) 的机动性和轻型连续体机器人 (CR) 的顺应性。现有的 TD-ACM 耦合动态建模方法会产生高昂的计算成本，并且没有明确考虑空中平台欠驱动。为了解决这些限制，本文提出了带有欠驱动底座的耦合 TD-ACM 的广义动态公式。该方法将应变参数化 Cosserat 杆模型与无人机刚体模型集成到 $\mathrm{SE}(3)$ 上的统一拉格朗日常微分方程 (ODE) 框架中，从而消除了计算密集型符号推导。基于所开发的模型，引入了强大的双摄像头基于图像的视觉伺服（IBVS）方案。所提出的控制器减轻了传统 IBVS 的视场 (FoV) 限制，补偿了无人机横向动力学引起的姿态引起的图像运动，并结合了低级自适应控制器，以通过形式稳定性保证来解决建模不确定性。在紧凑的定制原型上进行的广泛模拟和实验验证证明了所提出的框架在现实场景中的有效性和鲁棒性。
Abstract：Tendon-driven aerial continuum manipulators (TD-ACMs) combine the maneuverability of uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs) with the compliance of lightweight continuum robots (CRs). Existing coupled dynamic modeling approaches for TD-ACMs incur high computational costs and do not explicitly account for aerial platform underactuation. To address these limitations, this paper presents a generalized dynamic formulation of a coupled TD-ACM with an underactuated base. The proposed approach integrates a strain-parameterized Cosserat rod model with a rigid-body model of the UAV into a unified Lagrangian ordinary differential equation (ODE) framework on $\mathrm{SE}(3)$, thereby eliminating computationally intensive symbolic derivations. Building upon the developed model, a robust dual-camera image-based visual servoing (IBVS) scheme is introduced. The proposed controller mitigates the field-of-view (FoV) limitations of conventional IBVS, compensates for attitude-induced image motion caused by UAV lateral dynamics, and incorporates a low-level adaptive controller to address modeling uncertainties with formal stability guarantees. Extensive simulations and experimental validation on a compact custom-built prototype demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework in real-world scenarios.

 


【6】Learning Multi-Agent Local Collision-Avoidance for Collaborative Carrying tasks with Coupled Quadrupedal Robots

标题 : 学习多智能体局部避免碰撞以实现耦合四足机器人的协作搬运任务
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23278
作者：Francesca Bray,Simone Tolomei,Andrei Cramariuc,Cesar Cadena,Marco Hutter
摘要：机器人协同搬运可以极大地有益于仓库和建筑工地管理等人类活动。然而，协调多个机器人的同时运动是一个重大挑战。现有的工作主要关注无障碍环境，这使得它们不适合大多数现实世界的应用。考虑障碍物的作品，要么过度适应特定的地形配置，要么依赖预先记录的地图与路径规划器相结合来计算无碰撞轨迹。这项工作的重点是两个机械连接到承载物体的四足机器人。我们提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的策略，可以仅使用机载传感来跟踪命令的速度方向，同时避免与附近障碍物发生碰撞，从而无需预先计算的轨迹和完整的地图知识。我们的工作提出了一种分层架构，其中感知的高级以对象为中心的策略命令两个预训练的运动策略。此外，我们采用受游戏启发的课程来逐步增加地形中障碍物的复杂性。我们在两个通过球形关节连接到杆的四足机器人上验证了我们的方法，并根据基于优化和分散的 RL 基线对其进行了基准测试。我们的硬件实验证明了我们的系统能够在未知环境中移动，而无需地图或路径规划器。我们的工作视频可在多媒体材料中找到。
Abstract：Robotic collaborative carrying could greatly benefit human activities like warehouse and construction site management. However, coordinating the simultaneous motion of multiple robots represents a significant challenge. Existing works primarily focus on obstacle-free environments, making them unsuitable for most real-world applications. Works that account for obstacles, either overfit to a specific terrain configuration or rely on pre-recorded maps combined with path planners to compute collision-free trajectories. This work focuses on two quadrupedal robots mechanically connected to a carried object. We propose a Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based policy that enables tracking a commanded velocity direction while avoiding collisions with nearby obstacles using only onboard sensing, eliminating the need for precomputed trajectories and complete map knowledge. Our work presents a hierarchical architecture, where a perceptive high-level object-centric policy commands two pretrained locomotion policies. Additionally, we employ a game-inspired curriculum to increase the complexity of obstacles in the terrain progressively. We validate our approach on two quadrupedal robots connected to a bar via spherical joints, benchmarking it against optimization-based and decentralized RL baselines. Our hardware experiments demonstrate the ability of our system to locomote in unknown environments without the need for a map or a path planner. The video of our work is available in the multimedia material.

 


【7】A Multimodal Framework for Human-Multi-Agent Interaction

标题 : 人机交互的多模式框架
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23271
作者：Shaid Hasan,Breenice Lee,Sujan Sarker,Tariq Iqbal
摘要：人机交互正日益转向多机器人、社交环境。现有系统很难将多模态感知、具体表达和协调决策整合到一个统一的框架中。这限制了共享物理空间中自然且可扩展的交互。我们通过引入用于人类多智能体交互的多模态框架来解决这一差距，其中每个机器人都作为自主认知智能体运行，具有集成的多模态感知和基于实施例的大语言模型（LLM）驱动的规划。在团队层面，集中协调机制规范轮流和代理参与，以防止言论重叠和行动冲突。我们的框架在两个人形机器人上实现，通过结合语音、手势、凝视和运动的交互策略，实现连贯的多智能体交互。代表性交互运行展示了跨代理的协调多模态推理和扎根的体现响应。未来的工作将侧重于更大规模的用户研究和对基于社会的多主体交互动态的更深入探索。
Abstract：Human-robot interaction is increasingly moving toward multi-robot, socially grounded environments. Existing systems struggle to integrate multimodal perception, embodied expression, and coordinated decision-making in a unified framework. This limits natural and scalable interaction in shared physical spaces. We address this gap by introducing a multimodal framework for human-multi-agent interaction in which each robot operates as an autonomous cognitive agent with integrated multimodal perception and Large Language Model (LLM)-driven planning grounded in embodiment. At the team level, a centralized coordination mechanism regulates turn-taking and agent participation to prevent overlapping speech and conflicting actions. Implemented on two humanoid robots, our framework enables coherent multi-agent interaction through interaction policies that combine speech, gesture, gaze, and locomotion. Representative interaction runs demonstrate coordinated multimodal reasoning across agents and grounded embodied responses. Future work will focus on larger-scale user studies and deeper exploration of socially grounded multi-agent interaction dynamics.

 


【8】Efficient Hybrid SE(3)-Equivariant Visuomotor Flow Policy via Spherical Harmonics for Robot Manipulation

标题 : 通过球谐函数实现机器人操纵的高效混合 SE(3)-等变视觉电机流策略
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23227
作者：Qinglun Zhang,Shen Cheng,Tian Dan,Haoqiang Fan,Guanghui Liu,Shuaicheng Liu
摘要：虽然现有的等变方法提高了数据效率，但它们存在计算强度高、依赖单模态输入以及与快速采样方法结合时不稳定的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了 E3Flow，这是一种解决等变扩散策略的关键局限性的新颖框架。 E3Flow 克服了这些挑战，首次成功地将高效的整流流与稳定的多模态等变学习相结合。我们的框架建立在球谐表示的基础上，以确保严格的 SO(3) 等方差。我们引入了一种新颖的不变特征增强模块（FEM），它动态融合混合视觉模式（点云和图像），为球谐特征注入丰富的视觉线索。我们在 MimicGen 的 8 项操作任务上评估 E3Flow，并进一步进行 4 项真实世界实验以验证其在物理环境中的有效性。仿真结果表明，与最先进的球形扩散策略 (SDP) 相比，E3Flow 的平均成功率提高了 3.12%，同时推理速度提高了 7 倍。因此，E3Flow 展示了机器人策略学习的性能、效率和数据效率之间新的、高效的权衡。代码：https://github.com/zql-kk/E3Flow。
Abstract：While existing equivariant methods enhance data efficiency, they suffer from high computational intensity, reliance on single-modality inputs, and instability when combined with fast-sampling methods. In this work, we propose E3Flow, a novel framework that addresses the critical limitations of equivariant diffusion policies. E3Flow overcomes these challenges, successfully unifying efficient rectified flow with stable, multi-modal equivariant learning for the first time. Our framework is built upon spherical harmonic representations to ensure rigorous SO(3) equivariance. We introduce a novel invariant Feature Enhancement Module (FEM) that dynamically fuses hybrid visual modalities (point clouds and images), injecting rich visual cues into the spherical harmonic features. We evaluate E3Flow on 8 manipulation tasks from the MimicGen and further conduct 4 real-world experiments to validate its effectiveness in physical environments. Simulation results show that E3Flow achieves a 3.12% improvement in average success rate over the state-of-the-art Spherical Diffusion Policy (SDP) while simultaneously delivering a 7x inference speedup. E3Flow thus demonstrates a new and highly effective trade-off between performance, efficiency, and data efficiency for robotic policy learning. Code: https://github.com/zql-kk/E3Flow.

 


【9】AeroScene: Progressive Scene Synthesis for Aerial Robotics

标题 : AeroScene：空中机器人的渐进式场景合成
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23224
作者：Nghia Vu,Tuong Do,Dzung Tran,Binh X. Nguyen,Hoan Nguyen,Erman Tjiputra,Quang D. Tran,Hai-Nguyen Nguyen,Anh Nguyen
摘要：生成模型已经在多个领域显示出巨大的影响，但它们在机器人技术中场景合成的潜力仍未得到充分开发。这种差距在无人机模拟器中更为明显，其中模拟环境仍然严重依赖手动工作，创建起来非常耗时且难以扩展。在这项工作中，我们引入了 AeroScene，这是一种用于渐进式 3D 场景合成的分层扩散模型。我们的方法利用层次结构感知标记化和多分支特征提取来推理全局布局和局部细节，确保物理合理性和语义一致性。这使得 AeroScene 特别适合为空中机器人任务（例如导航、着陆和栖息）生成逼真的场景。我们通过对新收集的数据集和公共基准进行大量实验来证明其有效性，表明 AeroScene 显着优于以前的方法。此外，我们使用 AeroScene 生成包含 1,000 多个物理就绪的高保真 3D 场景的大型数据集，这些场景可以直接集成到 NVIDIA Isaac Sim 中。最后，我们说明了这些生成的环境在下游无人机导航任务中的实用性。我们的代码和数据集可在 aioz-ai.github.io/AeroScene/ 上公开获取
Abstract：Generative models have shown substantial impact across multiple domains, their potential for scene synthesis remains underexplored in robotics. This gap is more evident in drone simulators, where simulation environments still rely heavily on manual efforts, which are time-consuming to create and difficult to scale. In this work, we introduce AeroScene, a hierarchical diffusion model for progressive 3D scene synthesis. Our approach leverages hierarchy-aware tokenization and multi-branch feature extraction to reason across both global layouts and local details, ensuring physical plausibility and semantic consistency. This makes AeroScene particularly suited for generating realistic scenes for aerial robotics tasks such as navigation, landing, and perching. We demonstrate its effectiveness through extensive experiments on our newly collected dataset and a public benchmark, showing that AeroScene significantly outperforms prior methods. Furthermore, we use AeroScene to generate a large-scale dataset of over 1,000 physics-ready, high fidelity 3D scenes that can be directly integrated into NVIDIA Isaac Sim. Finally, we illustrate the utility of these generated environments on downstream drone navigation tasks. Our code and dataset are publicly available at aioz-ai.github.io/AeroScene/

 


【10】Path Planning and Reinforcement Learning-Driven Control of On-Orbit Free-Flying Multi-Arm Robots

标题 : 在轨自由飞行多臂机器人的路径规划和强化学习驱动控制
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23182
作者：Álvaro Belmonte-Baeza,José Luis Ramón,Leonard Felicetti,Miguel Cazorla,Jorge Pomares
摘要：本文提出了一种混合方法，集成了轨迹优化（TO）和强化学习（RL），用于在轨服务场景中自由飞行多臂机器人的运动规划和控制。该系统集成了 TO 来生成可行、高效的路径，同时考虑动态和运动学约束，并集成 RL 来实现不确定性下的自适应轨迹跟踪。多臂机器人设计，配备推进器，实现精确的机身控制，在复杂的空间作业中实现冗余和稳定性。 TO 优化了手臂运动和推进力，减少了对手臂稳定的依赖并增强了机动性。强化学习通过利用无模型控制来适应动态交互和干扰，进一步完善了这一点。通过综合模拟验证的实验结果证明了所提出的混合方法的有效性和鲁棒性。探讨了两个案例研究：具有初始接触的表面运动和需要表面近似的自由浮动场景。在这两种情况下，混合方法都优于传统策略。特别是，推进器显着提高了运动平稳性、安全性和操作效率。强化学习策略有效地跟踪 TO 生成的轨迹，处理高维动作空间和动态不匹配。 TO 和 RL 的这种集成将精确的特定任务规划的优势与强大的适应性结合起来，确保在空间环境的不确定和动态条件特征下保持高性能。通过解决运动耦合、环境干扰和动态控制要求等挑战，该框架为提高空间机器人系统的自主性和有效性奠定了坚实的基础。
Abstract：This paper presents a hybrid approach that integrates trajectory optimization (TO) and reinforcement learning (RL) for motion planning and control of free-flying multi-arm robots in on-orbit servicing scenarios. The proposed system integrates TO for generating feasible, efficient paths while accounting for dynamic and kinematic constraints, and RL for adaptive trajectory tracking under uncertainties. The multi-arm robot design, equipped with thrusters for precise body control, enables redundancy and stability in complex space operations. TO optimizes arm motions and thruster forces, reducing reliance on the arms for stabilization and enhancing maneuverability. RL further refines this by leveraging model-free control to adapt to dynamic interactions and disturbances. The experimental results validated through comprehensive simulations demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed hybrid approach. Two case studies are explored: surface motion with initial contact and a free-floating scenario requiring surface approximation. In both cases, the hybrid method outperforms traditional strategies. In particular, the thrusters notably enhance motion smoothness, safety, and operational efficiency. The RL policy effectively tracks TO-generated trajectories, handling high-dimensional action spaces and dynamic mismatches. This integration of TO and RL combines the strengths of precise, task-specific planning with robust adaptability, ensuring high performance in the uncertain and dynamic conditions characteristic of space environments. By addressing challenges such as motion coupling, environmental disturbances, and dynamic control requirements, this framework establishes a strong foundation for advancing the autonomy and effectiveness of space robotic systems.

 


 

神经元和认知(q-bio.NC:Neurons and Cognition)

【1】Bridging neuroscience and AI: adaptive, culturally sensitive technologies transforming aphasia rehabilitation

标题 : 连接神经科学和人工智能：适应性、文化敏感技术改变失语症康复
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22357
作者：Andreea I. Niculescu,Jochen Ehnes,Minghui Dong
摘要：失语症是一种主要由中风或脑损伤引起的语言障碍，严重扰乱沟通和日常功能。尽管言语治疗取得了进步，但治疗师的有限性和个性化、文化相关工具的缺乏等障碍仍然阻碍着最佳的康复结果。本文回顾了有助于失语症诊断和治疗的神经认知研究和语言技术的最新进展。根据我们的人种学实地研究结果，我们推出了两种数字治疗原型，旨在反映当地语言多样性并提高患者参与度。我们还展示了神经科学和当地背景的见解如何指导这些工具的设计，以更好地满足患者和治疗师的需求。我们的工作强调了自适应人工智能增强辅助技术在补充传统治疗和扩大治疗机会方面的潜力。最后，我们概述了推进个性化和可扩展失语症康复的未来研究方向。
Abstract：Aphasia, a language impairment primarily resulting from stroke or brain injury, profoundly disrupts communication and everyday functioning. Despite advances in speech therapy, barriers such as limited therapist availability and the scarcity of personalized, culturally relevant tools continue to hinder optimal rehabilitation outcomes. This paper reviews recent developments in neurocognitive research and language technologies that contribute to the diagnosis and therapy of aphasia. Drawing on findings from our ethnographic field study, we introduce two digital therapy prototypes designed to reflect local linguistic diversity and enhance patient engagement. We also show how insights from neuroscience and the local context guided the design of these tools to better meet patient and therapist needs. Our work highlights the potential of adaptive, AI-enhanced assistive technologies to complement conventional therapy and broaden access to therapy. We conclude by outlining future research directions for advancing personalized and scalable aphasia rehabilitation.

 


【2】Ca2+ transient detection and segmentation with the Astronomically motivated algorithm for Background Estimation And Transient Segmentation (Astro-BEATS)

标题 : 使用天文动机背景估计和瞬态分割算法 (Astro-BEATS) 进行 Ca2+ 瞬态检测和分割
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22311
作者：Bolin Fan,Anthony Bilodeau,Frederic Beaupre,Theresa Wiesner,Christian Gagne,Flavie Lavoie-Cardinal,Renee Hlozek
摘要：基于荧光的 Ca$^{2+}$-成像是研究局部神经元活动（包括微型突触钙瞬变）的强大工具，可提供对突触活动的实时洞察。这些瞬态仅引起荧光信号的细微变化，通常仅略高于基线，这对自动突触瞬态检测和分割提出了重大挑战。检测天文瞬变同样需要高效的算法，该算法在具有不同噪声特性的大视场中保持鲁棒性。我们利用天文瞬态检测中使用的技术在荧光显微镜中进行微型突触钙瞬态检测。我们推出了 Astro-BEATS，这是一种自动微型突触钙瞬态分割算法，它结合了天文学中使用的图像估计和源查找技术，专为 Ca$^{2+}$ 成像视频而设计。 Astro-BEATS 在突触 Ca$^{2+}$ 瞬态检测和分割方面优于当前基于阈值的方法。生成的分割掩模可用于训练监督深度学习算法，以改进 Ca$^{2+}$ 成像数据中的突触 Ca$^{2+}$ 瞬态检测。 Astro-BEATS 的速度及其对以前未见过的数据集的适用性（无需重新优化）使其对于为基于深度学习的方法生成训练数据集特别有用。
Abstract：Fluorescence-based Ca$^{2+}$-imaging is a powerful tool for studying localized neuronal activity, including miniature Synaptic Calcium Transients, providing real-time insights into synaptic activity. These transients induce only subtle changes in the fluorescence signal, often barely above baseline, which poses a significant challenge for automated synaptic transient detection and segmentation. Detecting astronomical transients similarly requires efficient algorithms that will remain robust over a large field of view with varying noise properties. We leverage techniques used in astronomical transient detection for miniature Synaptic Calcium Transient detection in fluorescence microscopy. We present Astro-BEATS, an automatic miniature Synaptic Calcium Transient segmentation algorithm that incorporates image estimation and source-finding techniques used in astronomy and designed for Ca$^{2+}$-imaging videos. Astro-BEATS outperforms current threshold-based approaches for synaptic Ca$^{2+}$ transient detection and segmentation. The produced segmentation masks can be used to train a supervised deep learning algorithm for improved synaptic Ca$^{2+}$ transient detection in Ca$^{2+}$-imaging data. The speed of Astro-BEATS and its applicability to previously unseen datasets without re-optimization makes it particularly useful for generating training datasets for deep learning-based approaches.

 

机器翻译由谷歌翻译提供，仅供参考
